overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a wizard character in a green robe and hat walking through Hogsmeade village at night. The character traverses cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passes through a wooden gate following an NPC, and enters Ollivanders wand shop.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a cobblestone path toward a wooden gate, passing garden vegetation and stone walls

entered.detail: half-timbered medieval houses with lit windows
low stone wall bordering the path
bushes and flowering plants along the wall
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path on the outskirts of a medieval village at night. Tudor-style cottages with lit windows line the left side while a stone wall and garden vegetation border the right. A gas street lamp illuminates the path ahead as the character approaches a wooden gate in the distance.

events.description: NPC with lantern appears and leads the way toward the wooden gate
character passes through the wooden gate into the narrow village passage

agents.ego_description: following an NPC villager carrying a lantern through a wooden gate and into a narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: villager in red coat carrying a lantern, opening and walking through the wooden gate ahead of the player

entered.detail: rustic wooden gate with stone pillars that opens to allow passage
tall stone walls flanking the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: An NPC villager with a lantern appears and leads the character through a wooden gate into a narrow, enclosed passage. The stone walls rise on both sides as the cobblestone path continues deeper into the village. The warm lantern light illuminates the immediate area while the gate recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hogsmeade village square with Tudor shops

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into the open village square with multiple shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square, passing various pedestrians and approaching the Ollivanders shop

notable_agents.action: villager in blue coat walking across the square and passing the player

entered.detail: open cobblestone plaza surrounded by Tudor buildings
corner shop with curved bay windows and 'OLLI' signage visible
traditional black and white timber-framed structures with multiple stories

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into the open village square of Hogsmeade. Tudor half-timbered buildings surround the cobblestone plaza, with the distinctive curved facade of Ollivanders wand shop visible ahead on the right. Other villagers walk through the square as the character approaches the shop entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ollivanders wand shop interior with floor-to-ceiling shelves

events.description: character enters the Ollivanders shop, transitioning from outdoor village to dimly lit interior

agents.ego_description: entering the wand shop and approaching the counter where the shopkeeper stands

notable_agents.action: elderly shopkeeper behind the counter examining a wand with a feather

entered.detail: dimly lit shop interior with warm lamp light and wooden furnishings
floor-to-ceiling shelves stacked with thousands of wand boxes
dark wooden shop counter with lamp and quill on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters Ollivanders wand shop, leaving the night air behind for the dimly lit interior. Floor-to-ceiling shelves packed with wand boxes line the walls. An elderly shopkeeper stands behind the wooden counter examining a wand with a long feather as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet, lamp-lit outskirts of a medieval village into the cluttered interior of a magic shop. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with Tudor cottages and garden vegetation, moving toward a distant wooden gate under the glow of a gas street lamp. As an NPC villager with a lantern appears, the camera follows them through the gate and into a narrow, enclosed stone passage that leads deeper into the village. The scene then opens into the wide village square of Hogsmeade, where the camera glides past half-timbered buildings and other villagers toward the curved facade of Ollivanders. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold of the shop, shifting from the night air to a dimly lit interior filled with floor-to-ceiling shelves of wand boxes and an elderly shopkeeper behind a wooden counter.
